## Golden Signals

| Signal   | Metric(s) | Threshold | Alert Severity |
|----------|-----------|-----------|----------------|
| Latency  | P50, P90, P99 | P99 > 200 ms for 5 min | Warning |
| Traffic  | req/s per service | Deviation > 2σ from baseline | Warning |
| Errors   | 5xx / total | > 1% for 2 min | Critical |
| Sat.     | CPU, memory, conn pool | > 85% for 5 min | Warning |
| Sat.     | Disk free (data dir) | < 15% free | Critical |

## SLOs

- **Availability:** 99.9% per rolling 30-day window
- **Error budget:** 43.2 min/month
- **Burn rate alert:** 2% of budget consumed in 1 hr: Page on-call
- **Burn rate critical:** 10% of budget consumed in 1 hr: Page manager
